title: How Cardano Governance Works
description: The big picture: who participates, how decisions are made, and what can be changed.

title: Who Votes on What
description: Deep dive into voting mechanics: which bodies vote on which actions, what the thresholds are, and why they differ.

title: Life of a Governance Action
description: Follow a proposal from submission to enactment: voting, ratification, chaining, and what can go wrong.

title: The Constitution and Its Enforcement
description: The written constitution, the committee that interprets it, and the Plutus script that enforces it.

title: How Smart Contract Costs Are Set
description: From Plutus benchmarks to on-chain parameters: how the price of running a smart contract gets decided.
